title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Sharekhan Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Sharekhan Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Sharekhan Global Group in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sharekhan Global Group:
Sharekhan Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sharekhan Global Group!
